# Forbidden-Scope Checklist

- [ ] No product code unless explicitly scoped.
- [ ] No MoneyEvent logic.
- [ ] No ledger logic.
- [ ] No invariants.
- [ ] No incident logic.
- [ ] No causal graph logic.
- [ ] No replay logic.
- [ ] No agent runtime.
- [ ] No repair planning logic.
- [ ] No UI features.
- [ ] No external connectors.
- [ ] No next submilestone or future milestone work.

- [ ] Registry updated.
- [ ] Current state updated.
- [ ] Weekly log updated.
- [ ] Next recommended thread updated.

# Safe-To-Merge Checklist

- [ ] QA PASS is recorded.
- [ ] Safe to merge only after QA PASS.
- [ ] Required validation passed or accepted limitations are recorded.
- [ ] Forbidden-scope checklist is clean.
- [ ] Conversations are resolved.
- [ ] PR is not blocked.
